svg.text: Architecture — My Personal Tech Blog on AWS EKS
eu-central-1 (Frankfurt) · 2 Availability Zones · Spot Instances · OIDC + IRSA
Infra values from Terraform state (fully dynamic)
Posts, Comments, Translations Cache, Audio Refs
blog-backend-role → Comprehend, Translate, Polly, S3, CloudWatch
blog-alb-controller-role → EC2, ELB (creates ALB from Ingress)
blog-github-actions-role → ECR, EKS, Terraform (OIDC, no stored keys)
